title: Epic-shaped request decomposition
larger_intended_outcome: Describe the larger outcome before choosing implementation lanes.

parent_acceptance.original_intent: State the full user/request parent intent before decomposition.
parent_acceptance.acceptance_target: State what must be true before the parent can be called complete.
parent_acceptance.parent_proof_required: State the evidence needed for parent closure, not only slice proof.
parent_acceptance.residual_intent_rule: Each promoted lane must name what parent intent remains unsatisfied.
parent_acceptance.clarification_needed_when: Ask or keep the parent open when clear broad intent would otherwise be narrowed.

non_goals: Do not put milestone execution detail here; promote ready slices into execplans.

candidate_lanes.title: First bounded lane
candidate_lanes.outcome: The bounded result this lane would deliver.
candidate_lanes.proof: High-level proof expectation; exact commands belong in the execplan.
candidate_lanes.slice_contribution_to_parent: How this lane advances the parent acceptance target.
candidate_lanes.residual_parent_intent: What parent intent remains after this lane if it lands.

proof_expectations: Each promoted lane records narrow validation in its execplan.
promotion_rule: Promote only lanes with clear outcome, owner surface, proof expectation, and bounded write scope.
